Skill.Name: Strike
Skill.Description: Attack an enemy character with normal force

Skill.Name: Throw
Skill.Description: Throw weapon at opponent with precision and force

Skill.Name: Power Strike
Skill.Description: Attack an enemy character with a crushing blow

Skill.Name: Overrun
Skill.Description: Attacks all enemies in the melee column

Skill.Name: Quick Lunge
Skill.Description: A quick attack that does not end your turn

Skill.Name: Pommel Strike
Skill.ToolTip: A stun that does not end your turn
Skill.Description: A quick stun that does not end your turn

Skill.Name: Desperate Swipe
Skill.Description: An attack that trades accuracy for power

Skill.Name: Shattering Blow
Skill.ToolTip: Deal damage and reduce your foe's defenses
Skill.Description: A powerful attack that also reduces your enemy's defenses by 50%

Skill.Name: Destroyer
Skill.Description: Crush your enemy, and see them driven before you

Skill.Name: Deadly Toss
Skill.Description: A powerful ranged attack

Skill.Name: Double Throw
Skill.Description: Throw weapon twice at opponent with precision and force

Skill.Name: Scattershot
Skill.Description: Sacrifice accuracy to attack all enemies

Skill.Name: Shield Mastery
Skill.Description: Gain additional defense when equipping a shield

Skill.Name: Shield Wall
Skill.ToolTip: Melee shield defense for your party
Skill.Description: Use your shield to defend your entire party from melee attacks

Skill.Name: Shield Tower
Skill.ToolTip: Ranged shield defense for your party
Skill.Description: Use your shield to defend your entire party from ranged attacks

Skill.Name: Shield Charge
Skill.ToolTip: Deal damage to entire row of Enemies
Skill.Description: A powerful attack that deals damage to an entire row of enemies

Skill.Name: Shield Bash
Skill.Description: Inflict no damage, but use your shield to cripple your enemy and weaken their defense

Skill.Name: Shield Strike
Skill.Description: Strike with your shield to gain additional defense

Skill.Name: Focus
Skill.Description: Increase your ability to make critical hits

Skill.Name: Taunt
Skill.Description: Taunt your enemies into attacking only you

Skill.Name: Rage
Skill.Description: Gather your anger to increase your attack power

Skill.Name: Terror
Skill.Description: Frighten enemies, reducing their ability to hit

Skill.Name: War Cry
Skill.Description: Encourage your other party members, increasing their attack power.

Skill.Name: Combat Training
Skill.Description: Increases the chances for a critical hit

Skill.Name: One-Handed Weapon Mastery
Skill.ToolTip: One-handed melee weapons are more accurate
Skill.Description: Increases the accuracy of equipped one-handed melee weapons

Skill.Name: Two-Handed Weapon Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases the accuracy of equipped two-handed weapons

Skill.Name: Targeted Attack
Skill.Description: An attack that never misses and increases the chance of a critical hit

Skill.Name: Axe Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and luck when a melee axe is equipped

Skill.Name: Club Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and defense when a melee club or mace is equipped

Skill.Name: Blade Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and agility when a melee sword or dagger is equipped

Skill.Name: Throw Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and accuracy when a throwable weapon is equipped

Skill.Name: Charge
Skill.ToolTip: Deal damage to entire row of Enemies
Skill.Description: A powerful attack that deals damage to an entire row of enemies

Skill.Name: Dread Howl
Skill.Description: The mabari lets out a loud howl, stunning most nearby enemies.

Skill.Name: Shred
Skill.ToolTip: An attack that always crits if it hits and causes the foe to bleed
Skill.Description: An attack that always crits if it hits and causes the foe to bleed

Skill.Name: Quick Lunge
Skill.Description: A quick attack that does not end your turn

Skill.Name: Mabari Fury
Skill.Description: Gather your anger to increase your attack power

Skill.Name: Growl
Skill.Description: Frighten your enemies, reducing their ability to hit

Skill.Name: War Cry
Skill.Description: Encourage your other party members, increasing their attack power.

Skill.Name: Evasion
Skill.Description: +Dodge %

Skill.Name: Fireball
Skill.Description: Fire a bolt at an enemy character

Skill.Name: Overrun
Skill.Description: Attacks all enemies in the melee column

Skill.Name: Fire Breath
Skill.ToolTip: Fire attack on a target and adjacent enemies
Skill.Description: Engulfs a foe and nearby enemies in flames.

Skill.Name: Ice Breath
Skill.ToolTip: Freezing attack on one foe and all adjacent enemies
Skill.Description: Freezing attack on one foe and all adjacent enemies.

Skill.Name: Lightning Breath
Skill.ToolTip: Lightning attack on a row of enemies
Skill.Description: Lightning attack on a row of enemies.

Skill.Name: Drake's Disdain
Skill.Description: Removes mana and health from the target enemy

Skill.Name: Drake Rage
Skill.Description: Gather your anger to increase your attack power

Skill.Name: Mental Fortress
Skill.Description: Increases Magic Resistance

Skill.Name: Mana Rasp
Skill.Description: Removes mana and health from enemy team

Skill.Name: Righteous Strike
Skill.Description: Damages the target and drains mana, giving it to you

Skill.Name: Holy Smite
Skill.Description: Removes all mana from a foe and deals +50% damage for each mana removed

Skill.Name: Combat Superiority
Skill.Description: Increases Melee Resistance

Skill.Name: Rally
Skill.ToolTip: Increases allies' attack, agility, and defense
Skill.Description: Rally your allies to improve attack, agility, and defense

Skill.Name: Motivate
Skill.ToolTip: Increases allies' attack, agility, and defense
Skill.Description: Raise your team's attack, agility, and defense at no mana cost

Skill.Name: Whirling Slash
Skill.Description: Attacks all enemies in the melee column, doesn't end turn

Skill.Name: Onslaught
Skill.Description: Attacks target for massive damage, and damages adjacent foes

Skill.Name: Blood Lust
Skill.Description: Increases your chance to critical

Skill.Name: Berserker
Skill.Description: Attack and regeneration bonus that may drain mana, ends when you have no mana

Skill.Name: Adrenaline
Skill.Description: Small attack bonus to self that costs no mana

Skill.Name: Death Strike
Skill.Description: A powerful attack that gives you and allies 1 mana if it kills

Skill.Name: Final Blow
Skill.Description: Drains your mana and deals damage equal to the amount drained

Skill.Name: Rock Armor
Skill.Description: Create magical armor for your allies

Skill.Name: Earthquake
Skill.Description: Swaps the targets in the front and back columns

Skill.Name: Hurl Rock
Skill.Description: A powerful ranged attack

Skill.Name: Ground Slam
Skill.Description: Slams your melee target and his neighbors for damage.

Skill.Name: Stone Roar
Skill.Description: Taunts all enemies into attacking only you

Skill.Name: Killing Blow
Skill.Description: An attack that trades cost for high critical chance

Skill.Name: Pulverizing Blows
Skill.ToolTip: Critical hits become more likely and higher attack
Skill.Description: Increase your attack and critical hit ability

Skill.Name: Avalanche
Skill.ToolTip: Throws rocks in the air to hit a column.
Skill.Description: Throws rocks in the air to damage a column of enemies.

Skill.Name: Inner Reserves
Skill.Description: Damages self to return mana

Skill.Name: Supernatural Resilience
Skill.Description: Increases a ally's damage resistance.
